channel.title: Shelby AI Deals
channel.description: Honest AI tool reviews for creators, freelancers, and small teams.

item.title: Pictory Review 2026: Turn Blog Posts Into Videos (Does It Actually Work?)
item.description: Pictory turns text into videos automatically using AI. We tested it with 20 real blog posts to see if the output is genuinely publish-worthy or just a gimmick.
item.author: ShelbyAIDeals Team

item.title: Make.com Review 2026: The Best Automation Platform for Non-Developers?
item.description: Make.com (formerly Integromat) lets you build complex automations visually. We automated 15 real workflows over six weeks to test its limits and value.
item.author: ShelbyAIDeals Team

item.title: Surfer SEO Review 2026: The Content Optimization Tool Freelancers Actually Need
item.description: We used Surfer SEO to optimize 20 articles over 90 days. Here is whether the $89/mo price tag is justified for freelancers and small content sites.
item.author: ShelbyAIDeals Team

item.title: Descript Review 2026: Can It Replace Your Entire Video Editing Suite?
item.description: Descript promises text-based video editing that anyone can use. We spent 45 days editing real client projects to find out if it truly delivers.
item.author: ShelbyAIDeals Team

item.title: Writesonic Review 2026: Best Budget AI Writer for Small Teams?
item.description: At $16/mo, Writesonic is one of the cheapest serious AI writers. We tested it for 30 days on real content to find out if budget pricing means budget quality.
item.author: ShelbyAIDeals Team

item.title: Jasper vs Copy.ai: Which AI Writer Actually Delivers? (2026 Test)
item.description: We tested Jasper and Copy.ai on the exact same briefs — ads, blog posts, emails, and sales copy. Here is who wins and when each tool is better.
item.author: ShelbyAIDeals Team

item.title: 7 Best AI Writing Tools for Freelancers in 2026 (Tested & Ranked)
item.description: We tested 12 AI writing tools and narrowed it down to 7 that actually deliver value for freelancers. Ranked by output quality, price, and real-world usability.
item.author: ShelbyAIDeals Team

item.title: Copy.ai Review 2026: Can It Replace a Freelance Copywriter?
item.description: We tested Copy.ai on real client work — ads, emails, blog posts, and sales pages. Here is whether it can actually replace hiring a freelance copywriter.
item.author: ShelbyAIDeals Team

item.title: Jasper AI Review 2026: Is It Still Worth It for Content Creators?
item.description: We spent 30 days testing Jasper AI on real content projects. Here is our honest take on pricing, output quality, and whether it is worth it in 2026.
item.author: ShelbyAIDeals Team

item.title: The Solopreneur AI Stack: Every Tool You Need for Under $100/mo
item.description: The complete AI tool stack for solopreneurs — writing, design, automation, SEO, and productivity — all tested and selected for under $100 per month.
item.author: ShelbyAIDeals Team
